title: Elbaf’s Crisis Converges
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Robin, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Children, Unknown person #3, Zoro as Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.
scene: Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So those vines are weak to higher temperatures!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm afraid there's no time to celebrate.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They were stabbed by our thorns!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Take the kids somewhere less dangerous!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: All of you, climb down!!! NOW!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are no more hostages to worry about!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You guys took your sweet time!! Don't tell me that dragon is-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: yup, it's lok!!! this place should be safe with you here!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since you've already gone giant mode, can you guys take care of those dream monsters?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Elbaf won't last long if we leave them be.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They came raining down outta nowhere!! These things are!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's more thorns!! Get the children inside, quick!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I ain't gonna let any of you trash heaps survive!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You cheated me out of that touching moment!!!

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Crisis Reaches the Straw Hats through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
